title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.335 - American Legion Memorial Highway — portion of U.S. Highway 65
text:
227.335.  American Legion Memorial Highway — portion of U.S. Highway 65. — The portion of U.S. Highway 65 located within this state from the Missouri-Iowa border south to the Missouri-Arkansas border, except where otherwise designated, shall be designated the "American Legion Memorial Highway".
(L. 2003 H.B. 261)
